title.en: The Conformance Checklists: PICS Proformas for Bridges (Annex A) and End Stations (Annex B)
title.zh: 一致性检查表：网桥（附录 A）与终端站（附录 B）的 PICS 形式表

blocks.en: IEEE Std 802.1Qcw-2023 adds six YANG data models to the bridging standard — machine-readable configuration schemas for Time-Aware Scheduled Traffic, Frame Preemption, and Per-Stream Filtering and Policing (PSFP). But how does anyone prove a product actually implements them? That is the job of the two short normative annexes we cover here: Annex A and Annex B. Both are PICS proformas. PICS stands for Protocol Implementation Conformance Statement — a standardized checklist a vendor fills in to declare, feature by feature, what their implementation supports. Annex A is the checklist for bridge (switch) implementations; Annex B is the checklist for end station (host/device) implementations.
blocks.zh: IEEE Std 802.1Qcw-2023 为网桥标准新增了六个 YANG 数据模型——也就是针对时间感知调度流量、帧抢占以及逐流过滤与监管（PSFP）的机器可读配置模式。但如何证明某个产品真正实现了它们？这正是本课要讲的两个简短规范性附录的职责：附录 A 和附录 B。两者都是 PICS 形式表。PICS 是「协议实现一致性声明」（Protocol Implementation Conformance Statement）的缩写——这是一份标准化的检查表，供厂商逐项填写，声明其实现支持哪些特性。附录 A 是面向网桥（交换机）实现的检查表；附录 B 则是面向终端站（主机/设备）实现的检查表。

blocks.en: An amendment never rewrites the base standard's annex from scratch — it splices in. That is why Annex A says "Insert the following rows at the end of the table in A.47" and Annex B says "Insert the following row at the end of the table in B.15." The Qcw rows join the existing 802.1Q-2022 PICS tables; the unchanged rows are simply not reprinted.
blocks.zh: 修正案从不从头重写基础标准的附录——它只是「拼接」进去。这就是为什么附录 A 写着「在 A.47 表格末尾插入以下行」，附录 B 写着「在 B.15 表格末尾插入以下行」。Qcw 的这些行会并入既有的 802.1Q-2022 PICS 表格；未改动的行则不再重印。

blocks.en: Every PICS row has the same five columns. Item is a short label (e.g., YANG-SCHED) used to cross-reference the feature. Feature is a plain-language question ("Is the ieee802-dot1q-sched module supported?"). Status says whether support is mandatory or optional, often predicated on other items. References points to the exact clause that defines the behavior. Support is the box the implementer ticks: Yes, No, or N/A (Not Applicable). The Status column uses a compact notation: "O" means optional, and "X:O" means "optional, but only relevant if feature X is supported" — a predicated option.
blocks.zh: 每一行 PICS 都有相同的五列。Item（项目）是一个简短标签（例如 YANG-SCHED），用于交叉引用该特性。Feature（特性）是一个用通俗语言表述的问题（「是否支持 ieee802-dot1q-sched 模块？」）。Status（状态）说明支持是强制还是可选，且常常以其他项目为前提。References（引用）指向定义该行为的确切条款。Support（支持）是实现者勾选的方框：是、否或 N/A（不适用）。Status 列使用一种紧凑记法：「O」表示可选，「X:O」表示「可选，但仅当支持特性 X 时才相关」——即一种带前提的可选项。

blocks.en: Annex A (clause A.47, "YANG") adds six bridge-side rows, one per new YANG module. Three are the core data models and three are their bridge-component companions: YANG-SCHED / YANG-SCHED-BRIDGE for scheduled traffic (predicated on SCHED or CQF), YANG-PREEMP / YANG-PREEMP-BRIDGE for frame preemption (predicated on PRE), and YANG-PSFP / YANG-PSFP-BRIDGE for per-stream filtering and policing (predicated on PSFP or CQF). CQF is Cyclic Queuing and Forwarding, a deterministic-latency scheme that depends on these same mechanisms — which is why it appears in several Status predicates. SCHED, PRE, and PSFP are the abbreviations for the three feature families.
blocks.zh: 附录 A（条款 A.47，「YANG」）新增了六行网桥侧内容，每个新 YANG 模块对应一行。其中三行是核心数据模型，另三行是它们的网桥组件配套模型：用于调度流量的 YANG-SCHED / YANG-SCHED-BRIDGE（以 SCHED 或 CQF 为前提）、用于帧抢占的 YANG-PREEMP / YANG-PREEMP-BRIDGE（以 PRE 为前提），以及用于逐流过滤与监管的 YANG-PSFP / YANG-PSFP-BRIDGE（以 PSFP 或 CQF 为前提）。CQF 是「循环排队与转发」（Cyclic Queuing and Forwarding），一种确定性时延方案，它依赖这些相同的机制——这就是它出现在多个 Status 前提中的原因。SCHED、PRE 和 PSFP 是这三个特性族的缩写。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 400 150" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="5" y="10" width="60" height="130"/><rect x="65" y="10" width="150" height="130"/><rect x="215" y="10" width="70" height="130"/><rect x="285" y="10" width="50" height="130"/><rect x="335" y="10" width="60" height="130"/><text x="35" y="30" text-anchor="middle" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9">Item</text><text x="140" y="30" text-anchor="middle" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9">Feature</text><text x="250" y="30" text-anchor="middle" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9">Status</text><text x="310" y="30" text-anchor="middle" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9">Refs</text><text x="365" y="30" text-anchor="middle" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9">Support</text><text x="35" y="75" text-anchor="middle" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="7">YANG-</text><text x="35" y="86" text-anchor="middle" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="7">SCHED</text><text x="140" y="80" text-anchor="middle" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="7">sched module?</text><text x="250" y="75" text-anchor="middle" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="7">SCHED or</text><text x="250" y="86" text-anchor="middle" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="7">CQF:O</text><text x="310" y="80" text-anchor="middle" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="7">48.6.17</text><rect x="345" y="72" width="8" height="8"/><text x="360" y="79" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="6">Yes</text></svg>

caption.en: Anatomy of a single PICS row (the YANG-SCHED entry from Annex A): Item, Feature question, Status predicate, clause Reference, and the tick-box Support column.
caption.zh: 单行 PICS 的结构剖析（附录 A 中的 YANG-SCHED 条目）：项目、特性问题、状态前提、条款引用，以及可勾选的支持列。

blocks.en: Annex B mirrors Annex A but for end stations — devices that originate or terminate streams rather than forward them. It touches three existing tables. Clause B.15 (Scheduled traffic) gains row SCHED4: "Is the ieee802-dot1q-sched YANG module supported?", with Status "YANG AND (SCHED OR CQF):O". Clause B.16 (Frame Preemption) gains row PRE4: "Is the ieee802-dot1q-preemption YANG module fully supported?", Status "PRE:O". Clause B.17 (Per-Stream Filtering and Policing) gains row PSFP4: "Is the ieee802-dot1q-psfp module supported?", Status "YANG AND (PSFP OR CQF):O". The compound "YANG AND (...)" predicate means the row is only relevant if the device both supports YANG management and the named feature family.
blocks.zh: 附录 B 与附录 A 相对应，但针对终端站——即产生或终止数据流、而非转发数据流的设备。它涉及三个既有表格。条款 B.15（调度流量）新增 SCHED4 行：「是否支持 ieee802-dot1q-sched YANG 模块？」，状态为「YANG AND (SCHED OR CQF):O」。条款 B.16（帧抢占）新增 PRE4 行：「是否完全支持 ieee802-dot1q-preemption YANG 模块？」，状态为「PRE:O」。条款 B.17（逐流过滤与监管）新增 PSFP4 行：「是否支持 ieee802-dot1q-psfp 模块？」，状态为「YANG AND (PSFP OR CQF):O」。复合前提「YANG AND (...)」意味着只有当设备同时支持 YANG 管理与所列特性族时，该行才相关。

blocks.en:
flowchart TD
  A[Does the device manage config via YANG?] -->|No| Z[Rows are N/A]
  A -->|Yes| B{Supports SCHED, PRE, or PSFP?}
  B -->|SCHED or CQF| S[Tick SCHED4 / YANG-SCHED]
  B -->|PRE| P[Tick PRE4 / YANG-PREEMP]
  B -->|PSFP or CQF| F[Tick PSFP4 / YANG-PSFP]
blocks.zh:
flowchart TD
  A[设备是否通过 YANG 管理配置?] -->|否| Z[这些行为 N/A]
  A -->|是| B{是否支持 SCHED、PRE 或 PSFP?}
  B -->|SCHED 或 CQF| S[勾选 SCHED4 / YANG-SCHED]
  B -->|PRE| P[勾选 PRE4 / YANG-PREEMP]
  B -->|PSFP 或 CQF| F[勾选 PSFP4 / YANG-PSFP]

blocks.en: Notice the asymmetry: Annex A (bridges) defines six rows because a bridge needs both the base module and its -bridge companion, which carries per-bridge-component data. Annex B (end stations) defines only three rows — end stations have no bridge components, so the -bridge modules do not apply to them.
blocks.zh: 注意这种不对称：附录 A（网桥）定义了六行，因为网桥既需要基础模块，也需要其 -bridge 配套模块（后者承载逐网桥组件的数据）。附录 B（终端站）只定义了三行——终端站没有网桥组件，因此 -bridge 模块对它们不适用。

summary.en: Coverage map: every row in Annex A and Annex B, with its exact clause references
summary.zh: 覆盖地图：附录 A 与附录 B 中的每一行及其确切条款引用

blocks.en:
Annex A (normative, p.169) — PICS proforma for Bridge implementations, clause A.47 (YANG): six rows are inserted. (1) YANG-SCHED — ieee802-dot1q-sched module; Status SCHED or CQF:O; ref 48.6.17. (2) YANG-SCHED-BRIDGE — ieee802-dot1q-sched-bridge; SCHED or CQF:O; ref 48.6.18. (3) YANG-PREEMP — ieee802-dot1q-preemption; PRE:O; ref 48.6.19. (4) YANG-PREEMP-BRIDGE — ieee802-dot1q-preemption-bridge; PRE:O; ref 48.6.20. (5) YANG-PSFP — ieee802-dot1q-psfp; PSFP or CQF:O; ref 48.6.21. (6) YANG-PSFP-BRIDGE — ieee802-dot1q-psfp-bridge; PSFP or CQF:O; ref 48.6.22.

Annex B (normative, p.170) — PICS proforma for End station implementations: three rows across three tables. Clause B.15 (Scheduled traffic) adds SCHED4 — ieee802-dot1q-sched module; Status YANG AND (SCHED OR CQF):O; refs 5.28 item c), 12.29, 48.6.17. Clause B.16 (Frame Preemption) adds PRE4 — ieee802-dot1q-preemption module fully supported; Status PRE:O; refs 5.4.1 item ae), 12.30, 48.6.19. Clause B.17 (Per-Stream Filtering and Policing) adds PSFP4 — ieee802-dot1q-psfp module; Status YANG AND (PSFP OR CQF):O; refs 12.31, 48.6.21. Both annexes carry the standard copyright-release footnote permitting free reproduction of the proforma for its intended conformance-declaration purpose.
blocks.zh:
附录 A（规范性，第 169 页）——网桥实现的 PICS 形式表，条款 A.47（YANG）：插入六行。(1) YANG-SCHED——ieee802-dot1q-sched 模块；状态 SCHED 或 CQF:O；引用 48.6.17。(2) YANG-SCHED-BRIDGE——ieee802-dot1q-sched-bridge；SCHED 或 CQF:O；引用 48.6.18。(3) YANG-PREEMP——ieee802-dot1q-preemption；PRE:O；引用 48.6.19。(4) YANG-PREEMP-BRIDGE——ieee802-dot1q-preemption-bridge；PRE:O；引用 48.6.20。(5) YANG-PSFP——ieee802-dot1q-psfp；PSFP 或 CQF:O；引用 48.6.21。(6) YANG-PSFP-BRIDGE——ieee802-dot1q-psfp-bridge；PSFP 或 CQF:O；引用 48.6.22。

附录 B（规范性，第 170 页）——终端站实现的 PICS 形式表：跨三个表格共三行。条款 B.15（调度流量）新增 SCHED4——ieee802-dot1q-sched 模块；状态 YANG AND (SCHED OR CQF):O；引用 5.28 项 c)、12.29、48.6.17。条款 B.16（帧抢占）新增 PRE4——完全支持 ieee802-dot1q-preemption 模块；状态 PRE:O；引用 5.4.1 项 ae)、12.30、48.6.19。条款 B.17（逐流过滤与监管）新增 PSFP4——ieee802-dot1q-psfp 模块；状态 YANG AND (PSFP OR CQF):O；引用 12.31、48.6.21。两个附录都附有标准的版权释放脚注，允许为预期的一致性声明用途自由复制该形式表。

blocks.en: Why does any of this matter to a learner? Because the PICS proforma is the bridge between the prose of a standard and a real, testable product. When a procurement team or an interoperability lab asks "does this switch do Time-Aware Scheduled Traffic via standard YANG?", they do not re-read clause 48; they read the vendor's completed Annex A and see whether the YANG-SCHED box is ticked Yes, with the clause reference proving where that obligation comes from. Annex A and Annex B are deliberately tiny in Qcw — just nine rows total — but they are the formal hooks that let the entire amendment be claimed, audited, and trusted.
blocks.zh: 这一切对学习者为何重要？因为 PICS 形式表是标准文字与真实、可测试产品之间的桥梁。当采购团队或互操作性实验室询问「这台交换机是否通过标准 YANG 实现时间感知调度流量？」时，他们不会重读条款 48；而是查阅厂商填好的附录 A，看 YANG-SCHED 方框是否勾选为「是」，并通过条款引用证明该义务的出处。在 Qcw 中，附录 A 与附录 B 刻意极为精简——总共仅九行——但它们正是让整份修正案得以被声明、审核与信任的正式挂钩点。

cites.note: Annex A (p.169) PICS proforma for Bridge implementations, clause A.47 YANG (six inserted rows); Annex B (p.170) PICS proforma for End station implementations, clauses B.15/B.16/B.17 (three inserted rows).
